channel.title: Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Very Important People on Dropout.tv

item.title: Last Looks: Sudzo
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Eugene Cordero became Sudzo.

Duration: 05:37

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, eugene cordero, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, paul robalino, behind the scenes

item.title: Sudzo
item.description:
Vic interviews Sudzo (Eugene Cordero) and learns all about superhero society.

Duration: 19:28

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, eugene cordero

item.title: Last Looks: Fanoli
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Angela Giarratana became Fanoli.

Duration: 05:21

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, angela giarratana, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, paul robalino, alisha silverstein, behind the scenes

item.title: Fanoli
item.description:
Vic interviews legendary entertainer Fanoli (Angela Giarratana) and gets a new theme song.

Duration: 25:24

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, angela giarratana

item.title: Last Looks: Archimedes and Ollie
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Brennan and Jacob became Archimedes and Ollie.

Duration: 06:42

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, brennan lee mulligan, jacob wysocki, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, paul robalino, behind the scenes

item.title: Archimedes and Ollie
item.description:
Vic interviews babies Archimedes and Ollie (Brennan Lee Mulligan and Jacob Wysocki).

Duration: 24:11

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, brennan lee mulligan, jacob wysocki
